category_sources: source_facts.description says immudb is a lightweight immutable database; official docs at https://docs.immudb.io/master/ describe key-value, SQL, and document database modes.

docs_sources: Official immudb documentation is hosted at docs.immudb.io; GitHub README also points to https://docs.immudb.io/.
